description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is primarily white with gray accents, and it includes large, vertically oriented windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. A prominent garage with a dark, flat roof is attached to one side, and the main entrance is recessed with a simple, rectangular door and a small overhang. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some rooms featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower level, creating a dynamic facade. The overall appearance is minimalist, with an emphasis on geometric forms and functional spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large vertical windows, and a prominent attached garage. The exterior is minimalist, featuring white and gray surfaces with clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the attached garage with a dark roof.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the asymmetrical window placement and the setback of the upper story.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more large windows and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Garage-dominant view with the garage roof in the foreground and the house structure behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple rectangular door, small overhang, and minimal decorative elements
